spans.content: Color is acrucial visual cue for object recognition,but CNNs fail to generalize if there is
dataimbalance between color variations.Color invariance addresses this issue by
removing all color information.We introduce Color Equivariant Convolutions (CEConvs):
a novel deep learning building block that sharesshape features across the color
